nodes.context: French far-right anti-Arab militant group active in the 1970s-1980s, targeting Algerian properties and offices.
French far-right paramilitary organization that fought against Algerian independence; veterans formed the Charles Martel Group.
Algerian-backed militant group in Mauritania; their actions provoked a Charles Martel Group kidnapping reprisal.

edges.context: The Charles Martel Group was formed by veterans of the Organisation armée secrète.
The Charles Martel Group kidnapped two Algerians as reprisal for Polisario Front's killing and kidnapping of French nationals.
